mnemonics.title: SHIELD - Blockchain Application Domains
mnemonics.content:
**S**upply Chain Tracking
**H**ealthcare Records
**I**dentity (Self-Sovereign)
**E**lectronic Voting
**L**and Registry
**D**ecentralized Finance

mnemonics.title: TIPS - Why Blockchain Suits These Applications
mnemonics.content:
**T**ransparency - all parties see the same data
**I**mmutability - records cannot be altered
**P**eer-to-peer - no central intermediary needed
**S**ecurity - cryptographic protection of data

mnemonics.title: Supply Chain Benefits: TRACE
mnemonics.content:
**T**ransparency of product journey
**R**eal-time tracking
**A**uthenticity verification
**C**ounterfeit detection
**E**fficiency in recalls
